name: Uptime Kuma
description: Service monitoring and uptime tracking with response-time graphs and status pages
author: Crow

env_vars.name: UPTIMEKUMA_USERNAME
env_vars.description: Admin username for Prometheus /metrics basic auth (set after first-run wizard)

notes: Uptime Kuma listens on 3001 inside the container and is published on 127.0.0.1:3007. On first launch, open the web UI to create the admin account. Uptime Kuma's primary API is socket.io (not REST); this bundle ships two host-side tools that only use the public ping endpoint and the Prometheus /metrics endpoint (basic auth). Monitor creation and pause/resume are not wrapped — use the web UI for those actions.
